testcase.name: testCreateNewUser

error.message: com.microsoft.sqlserver.jdbc.SQLServerException: Violation of PRIMARY KEY constraint 'PK__Users__CA1E34ACE396ACFC'. Cannot insert duplicate key in object 'dbo.Users'. The duplicate key value is (0901234567). INSERT INTO Users (Sdt, Password, Status, Fullname, Photo, Role) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) [Ljava.lang.Object;@42b02722
